cover.title: what we shipped this week
cover.sub: A fleet of agents runs our growth team. Here's the log.

slides.title: shipped
items: Flipped trovex to public beta — open source, install + star, no waitlist
Shipped a live savings dashboard (and posted the real receipt)
Published 6 research write-ups: METR, DORA, GitClear, Stanford, Apple, ETH Zurich
Wired the whole growth team as a fleet of agents on one shared board

cta.title: follow the build
cta.sub: We post the real logs, numbers, and the misses too.
